parameters.text: =⚠️ Bot is DOWN {{ $json.name }} is not running on the VPS. Restart command: cd ~/python-scripts && nohup python {{ $json.grep }} >> logs/bot.log 2>&1 &

meta.notes:
SETUP REQUIRED:
1. Create 'OpenClaw Bot' Telegram credential (same bot token)
2. Set n8n env var: TELEGRAM_USER_ID
3. The 'Execute Command' node runs on the n8n host — make sure n8n runs ON the VPS where your bots run
4. Activate the workflow

NOTE: If n8n is NOT on the same VPS as your bots, replace 'Execute Command' with an SSH node pointing to your VPS.
